title: Malvern College Leavers' Ball & Thorpeness (John)

main_route.excerpt: Malvern College Leavers Ball  Friday 8th July 2005  9pm – 1am

unresolved.issue: Thorpeness (Suffolk) appears in the title_guess but is absent from the single transcribed diary page (B_0063_L). It may refer to a subsequent destination after the Malvern ball, possibly on pages not included in this bundle (mixed_start:true suggests a boundary overlap). Cannot confirm as a stop without diary evidence.

boundary_flags: mixed_start: B_0063_L is a boundary page shared with the preceding trip; additional content relating to this trip (possibly including Thorpeness) may appear on adjacent pages not captured in this bundle.
summary: John's Malvern College Leavers' Ball on the evening of 8 July 2005 (9pm–1am), marking the end of his time at the school. The surviving diary page is a single glued-in printed event card; a possible further leg to Thorpeness (Suffolk) is suggested by the trip title but is not attested in the transcribed pages.
extraction_notes: Only one page transcribed (B_0063_L), which contains a glued-in printed card for the Malvern College Leavers Ball on Friday 8 July 2005. No narrative text describes travel to or from Malvern. Travellers not named on this page; John is identified from the trip title as the leaver; parents (Simon/Eve) likely attended but are not evidenced. Thorpeness is present in the title_guess only — not in any transcribed page — so it has been placed in unresolved rather than the main route. The mixed_start flag suggests the page boundary may overlap with an adjacent trip; if further pages covering this trip are located they may resolve Thorpeness. No crossings (entirely UK domestic). The date_end is set to 2005-07-08 (the ball date) as no other dates are available; the true trip end may be later if Thorpeness is confirmed.
